## Welcome to Lactopia

[![Image 6](https://lactopia.de/upload/en/content_welcome.jpg)](https://lactopia.de/upload/en/content_welcome.jpg)

# Your expert for probiotics.

The Microbiome in Balance

The importance to have the microbiome in harmony is now in some aspects well known. Nobody would question this anymore. It plays a role, not only for humans, but also for animals and in the field of hygiene.

 Lactopia has focused all company activities towards finding solutions to enable a balance between "good" and "bad" bacteria where this harmony has been
